{
    "api_key": "k1CJmVe01yOWEulsb4ri",
    "specification": {
        "version": "1.0",
        "inputs": [
            {
                "type": "InferenceImage",
                "name": "image"
            }
        ],
        "steps": [
            {
                "type": "roboflow_core/roboflow_object_detection_model@v2",
                "name": "model",
                "images": "$inputs.image",
                "model_id": "people-detection-o4rdr/7"
            },
            {
                "type": "roboflow_core/bounding_box_visualization@v1",
                "name": "bounding_box_visualization",
                "image": "$inputs.image",
                "predictions": "$steps.model.predictions"
            }
        ],
        "outputs": [
            {
                "type": "JsonField",
                "name": "output_1",
                "coordinates_system": "own",
                "selector": "$steps.bounding_box_visualization.image"
            },
            {
                "type": "JsonField",
                "name": "output_2",
                "coordinates_system": "own",
                "selector": "$steps.model.predictions"
            }
        ],
        "metadata": {
            "ui": {
                "nodes": {
                    "$inputs": {
                        "x": 0,
                        "y": -250
                    },
                    "$outputs": {
                        "x": -41.69947506561681,
                        "y": 292.8477690288714
                    },
                    "$steps.model": {
                        "x": -51.78805774278216,
                        "y": -20.971128608923912
                    },
                    "$steps.bounding_box_visualization": {
                        "x": -4.708005249343842,
                        "y": 118.92388451443567
                    }
                },
                "edges": [
                    {
                        "source": "$inputs",
                        "target": "$steps.model"
                    },
                    {
                        "source": "$steps.model",
                        "target": "$steps.bounding_box_visualization",
                        "sourceSelector": "value"
                    },
                    {
                        "source": "$steps.bounding_box_visualization",
                        "target": "$outputs"
                    }
                ],
                "groups": []
            }
        }
    },
    "inputs": {
        "image": {
            "mediaType": "image",
            "videoType": "file",
            "type": "base64",
            "value": "",
            "path": "5962231f1260a4a380c6cb3615ee0a45 - 副本.jpg",
            "prefix": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
            "resized": false,
            "originalDimensions": {
                "width": 683,
                "height": 1024
            },
            "newDimensions": {
                "width": 683,
                "height": 1024
            }
        }
    },
    "is_preview": true,
    "workflow_id": "20sjzEAGC81oWOeIy9QA"
}
